compressed_prompt:
Is it true that the first song ever sung in outer space is “Happy Birthday.”

Your answer must contain one of the following phrases:
My answer is yes.
My answer is no.
My answer is maybe.
response:
My answer is yes.

The first song ever sung in outer space was indeed "Happy Birthday." Astronauts on the Gemini 6 mission in 1965 played a prank by reporting a "sighting" of Santa Claus and then serenading Mission Control with a harmonica rendition of "Happy Birthday" (along with "Jingle Bells"). This lighthearted moment marked the first musical performance in space.
